reviews.review_description: Only writing this because I need to unlock some features on this app, which I don’t love because it’s so you have to pay for extra things when you’ve already paid for the app.

developer_response.body: You can purchase Pickleball app where those features come standard. It costs $10.99. There is a bundle that lets you upgrade. The best we can do is to provide choice at different price points. Such reviews don't help.
Thank you very much for the review!

reviews.review_description: As I start to learn the game, I can't changed between modes. I am stuff hitting balls. None of the features work. They did initially. I've Uninstaller twice. 😏

developer_response.body:
This was rooted caused to a HW issue. As the controllers get old dust accumulates in the switches and they don't work perfectly. This specific issue occurs when the trigger button on the controller reports that its not fully released. So when you point the pointer on the tiles it starts dragging the tiles which blocks the click action. As a workaround to accommodate imperfect hardware we have released update on Pickleball app to disable dragging. The real solution would be to clean the HW controller switches using compressed air or contact cleaning solution.

Sorry but we have not released any new updates in months so its hard to say why features stopped working for you. When did it happen? Which modes are you trying to switch to? Can you please reach out using Discord, Facebook group or support email mentioned in the listing so we can help root cause and fix your issue?  Thanks.

reviews.review_description: Impressive physics. I was able to place the ball very accurately. It actually has a generous set of features like single handed play, pause/resume, fully programmable ball machine & leaderboards that aren't even there in some of the more expensive Pickleball apps. Highly recommended.

developer_response.body: Thank for reviewing. We are glad you like it.

reviews.review_description: Just getting started learning about pickleball.  Like the practice of serving and hitting
Super realistic physics and an excellent pickleball app

developer_response.body: Thank for reviewing. We are glad you like it.

reviews.review_description: As a a newbie to both pickleball and VR, this game is perfect. The graphics are good. The physical action is great and there are no confusing complications. I did learn that you have to select ambidextrous in order to switch paddle hands.

developer_response.body: Thank you for reviewing and we are happy you like it. Previously swapping paddle hand could be done without selecting ambidextrous mode but it led to accidental swaps for people who like to play with one hand only. So based on feedback we added a checkbox for ambidextrous mode. VR play against AI is a good way to develop ambidexterity.

reviews.review_description: Physics aren't very good.  I've played/own many other racquet games on Quest.  Sorry to say, but the ball reaction in this game is inferior to all other games in the store that I have tried.

developer_response.body: Sorry this type of feedback doesn't help since you are being vague. In what way is it inferior and what would you like changed. If you have some changes you would like to see jump on the discord with the specifics. Most of the time such feedback is from competitors but since we have the most configurable physics we can help you customize it to match expectations. The game supports 3 types of physics and each type has multiple user configurable settings,
